title: Design System: Aman Thanvi Personal Website

headline.purpose: Section headings and primary scan anchors.

body.purpose: Technical prose, kept under 65ch where possible.

label.purpose: Status, section IDs, tags, and compact metadata.

shadows.name: accent-hover-glow
shadows.purpose: Interactive inspection state on project rows, cards, and buttons.

shadows.name: avatar-ambient-glow
shadows.purpose: Low-alpha identity emphasis behind the profile image.

motion.name: ease-reveal
motion.purpose: Scroll reveal, divider draw, avatar scan, and circuit draw.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: Hover/focus color, border, and glow transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; border: 1px solid var(--color-accent-hero); border-radius: 8px; background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-accent-hero) 12%, transparent); color: var(--color-accent-hero); padding: 10px 20px; font: 600 14px var(--font-mono); transition: background 0.3s ease, color 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--color-accent-hero); color: var(--color-bg); box-shadow: 0 0 28px var(--color-glow-hero); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-accent-hero); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-border) 60%, transparent); border-radius: 8px; background: transparent; color: var(--color-muted); padding: 10px 20px; font: 400 14px var(--font-mono); transition: border-color 0.3s ease, color 0.3s ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: var(--color-accent-hero); color: var(--color-text); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-accent-hero); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Evidence Chip
components.description: Compact proof label for technologies, credentials, and domains.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, var(--section-accent) 24%, transparent); border-radius: 6px; background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--section-accent) 10%, transparent); color: var(--section-accent); padding: 2px 8px; font: 500 10px var(--font-mono); }

components.name: HUD Frame
components.description: Evidence container with one-pixel border and subtle corner brackets.
components.html:
IT Cybersecurity Specialist

Provided cybersecurity oversight across DOJ mission-critical systems.
components.css: .ds-hud-frame { position: relative; border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: 8px; background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-surface) 60%, transparent); color: var(--color-text); padding: 20px; transition: border-color 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease; } .ds-hud-frame:hover { border-color: color-mix(in oklch, var(--section-accent) 45%, var(--color-border)); box-shadow: 0 0 20px var(--section-glow); } .ds-hud-frame h3 { margin: 0 0 8px; font: 600 16px var(--font-heading); } .ds-hud-frame p { margin: 0; color: var(--color-muted); font: 400 14px/1.6 var(--font-mono); }

components.name: Section Navigation Dot
components.css: .ds-nav-dot { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 24px; height: 24px; border: 0; background: transparent; padding: 0; } .ds-nav-dot span { display: block; width: 8px; height: 8px; border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: 999px; background: transparent; transition: transform 0.3s ease, border-color 0.3s ease, background 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease; } .ds-nav-dot:hover span { transform: scale(1.5); border-color: var(--section-accent); } .ds-nav-dot[aria-current="true"] span { border-color: var(--section-accent); background: var(--section-accent); box-shadow: 0 0 8px var(--section-accent); } .ds-nav-dot:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--section-accent); outline-offset: 3px; }

narrative.overview:
The system should feel like a calm security operations room after the incident has been contained: precise instruments, readable evidence, and quiet confidence. The visual language uses HUD frames, terminal rhythms, circuit traces, and section accents, but every effect must serve credibility and scanning speed.

This is a brand portfolio, not a dashboard. The design communicates expertise through sequencing, hierarchy, concise prose, and controlled atmosphere. It explicitly rejects generic SaaS landing-page tropes, oversized metric blocks, hero proof-card clusters, decorative glass panels, flat identical card grids, fake terminal noise that hides content, and hacker-cliche neon overload.
keyCharacteristics: Dark default with light, dune, and arcade alternates preserved.
Section-specific accents that behave like evidence labels, not decoration.
Monospace body copy as an existing identity choice, balanced by Sora headings.
Flat surfaces at rest, accent glow only for state and signal.
Uncluttered hero prose, with compact evidence patterns reserved for lower sections when they improve scanning.

rules.name: The Accent-as-Evidence Rule
rules.body: Section accents mark content type and state. Never spread all five accents into one local component.

rules.name: The Glow Budget Rule
rules.body: Glow appears on hover, focus, current navigation, and select ambient hero details. Static content should stay mostly flat.

rules.name: The No-Negative-Tracking Rule
rules.body: Letter spacing is never negative. Hierarchy comes from size, weight, color, and rhythm.

rules.name: The Prose-Wall Test
rules.body: Any paragraph over three factual clauses should become a list, proof grid, or tighter two-paragraph block.

rules.name: The Flat-Until-Inspected Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Elevation appears when a visitor hovers, focuses, or navigates.

dos: Do lead with verified signal: role, domains, credentials, and contact paths.
Do keep accent colors tied to sections and content types.
Do keep the hero uncluttered: image, role, concise prose, and contact links.
Do preserve light, dark, dune, arcade, and reduced-motion behavior when changing components.
Do use one-pixel borders, 8px maximum radius, and glow only as state.
donts: Don't use generic SaaS landing-page tropes.
Don't use flat identical card grids as the default layout.
Don't use fake terminal noise that hides content.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent.
Don't make the profile, projects, experience, and skills all compete with the same visual intensity.
